penalties.description: Task appears to be a training demonstration rather than a completed performance attempt with clear timing markers.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Fundamental disagreement on task completion status. Claude identified this as a training demonstration without clear timing markers, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed task. Given the lack of visible timing start/end points and the presence of instructional elements, the incomplete_task classification is more defensible under the rubric.
